name: Aztec Pyramid Avocado Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mash the 3 avocados.
2. Blend in the lemon juice, mixing well. Spread evenly in a bowl or serving plate to the edges of the dish.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth and creamy. Blend in the sour cream, then blend in the taco seasoning, mixing well. Spread over the avocado layer.
4. Sprinkle the cheddar cheese over the cream cheese mixture.
5. Distribute the tomatoes over the cheddar cheese layer.
6. Spread the green onions over the tomato layer.
7. Top with the black olives.
8. Serve at room temperature. Makes about 10 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Tortilla Chips, Bell Peppers, Lobster, Jicama
